settings.headline: Where healthy hair meets glossy lips.
settings.subline: Polished essentials for the everyday — soft on skin, kind to hair, made for shine.

settings.headline: Two rituals. One feeling.
settings.body: AMR began with two small ideas worth doing well — care for hair that feels healthy, and a gloss that feels like you. Every product is shaped for the in-between moments: the slow morning, the second look, the easy reach for something soft. Considered, never complicated.

settings.headline: Find your everyday.
settings.tile_one_subline: Oils and masks for soft, healthy-looking hair.
settings.tile_two_subline: Glosses and lip tones built for soft, everyday shine.
settings.tile_three_subline: Hair + lip, together — the full AMR feeling.

settings.headline: Made for the in-between.
settings.col_one_body: Softly scented, comfortable to wear, easy to reach for.
settings.col_two_body: Two product worlds, one quiet aesthetic — built to live on the same shelf.
settings.col_three_body: Pieces that finish a look without taking it over.
settings.col_four_body: Made in considered quantities, packed with intention.

settings.section_subline: Two rituals that share a feeling.
settings.left_body: Glosses and lip tones made for everyday wear — the kind you reach for without thinking.
settings.right_body: Oils and masks shaped around how hair actually feels — soft to the touch, light on the scalp.

settings.headline: Loved by the AMR community.
settings.placeholder_quote: Real customer review will appear here once a reviews app is connected.
settings.placeholder_note: Reviews section is structured and ready — once a reviews app is installed, real customer quotes populate here automatically.

settings.question: When will my order ship?
settings.answer: Orders are packed within 1–3 business days. You'll receive tracking by email as soon as your package is on its way.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes — we ship to most countries. Shipping options and rates appear at checkout based on your address.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: Unopened products can be returned within 14 days of delivery. For hygiene reasons, opened lip and hair products cannot be returned. Reach out and we'll take care of you.

settings.question: Are AMR products safe for sensitive skin and scalps?
settings.answer: Our formulas are designed to feel comfortable for most skin types. We always recommend a patch test before first use. If you have a known sensitivity, check the ingredients on each product page.

settings.question: Can I use the hair oil daily?
settings.answer: Yes — the hair oil is light enough for daily wear. Many love it as a finishing oil on dry hair; it also works as a pre-wash treatment on damp ends.

settings.question: How do I reach you?
settings.answer: You can reach us through the contact form, or via Instagram at @amr.cosmeticss.

settings.headline: Join the AMR letter.

settings.micro_note: No spam — just AMR. Unsubscribe anytime.
